clinical_vignette: 58yo F, R knee end-stage OA, arthroscopy + TKA same session
clinical_input: Pt with severe R knee OA. Arthroscopic evaluation performed confirming tricompartmental disease. Proceeded to R total knee arthroplasty.
rationale: Block: knee arthroscopy bundled into TKA per NCCI. Suppress 29881.

clinical_vignette: 71yo M, R shoulder massive rotator cuff tear, scope + open repair
clinical_input: Medicare pt with chronic R shoulder pain. Arthroscopic exam showed massive RCR tear not amenable to arthroscopic repair. Converted to open rotator cuff repair.
rationale: Block: shoulder arthroscopy bundled into open RCR per NCCI. Suppress 29805.

clinical_vignette: 64yo F, L hip OA, scope + THA same session
clinical_input: Pt with progressive L hip OA. Arthroscopic evaluation performed, confirmed severe articular cartilage loss. Proceeded to L total hip arthroplasty.
rationale: Block: hip arthroscopy bundled into THA per NCCI. Suppress 29860.

clinical_vignette: 55yo M, R ankle loose body + open Achilles repair
clinical_input: Medicare pt with R ankle impingement and chronic Achilles tendinopathy. Arthroscopic loose body removal followed by open Achilles repair same session.
rationale: Block: ankle arthroscopy bundled into open Achilles repair per NCCI. Suppress 29894.

clinical_vignette: 52yo M, bilateral knees, R knee scope + L knee open ligament repair
clinical_input: Pt with R knee medial meniscus tear and L knee chronic MCL instability. R knee arthroscopic meniscectomy and separate L knee open collateral ligament repair performed same day by same surgeon.
rationale: Pass: different joints (R knee vs L knee), no PTP conflict.

clinical_vignette: 49yo M, R knee OA, injection + arthroscopy same knee same day
clinical_input: Pt with R knee OA. Corticosteroid injection into R knee joint followed by R knee arthroscopic debridement same encounter.
rationale: Block: knee injection bundled into knee arthroscopy per NCCI. Suppress 20610.

clinical_vignette: 68yo F, L shoulder impingement, injection + scope same shoulder
clinical_input: Medicare pt with L shoulder impingement syndrome. Intra-articular L shoulder injection and L shoulder arthroscopic subacromial decompression same session.
rationale: Block: shoulder injection bundled into shoulder arthroscopy per NCCI. Suppress 20610.

clinical_vignette: 57yo M, R hip OA, injection + hip scope same day
clinical_input: Pt with R hip OA. R hip joint injection and R hip arthroscopic chondroplasty performed same encounter.
rationale: Block: hip injection bundled into hip arthroscopy per NCCI. Suppress 20610.

clinical_vignette: 45yo F, R knee injection + L shoulder scope, different joints
clinical_input: Pt with R knee OA and L shoulder impingement. R knee corticosteroid injection and L shoulder arthroscopic acromioplasty same day.
rationale: Pass: injection and arthroscopy on different joints, no PTP bundling conflict.

clinical_vignette: 62yo M, L ankle effusion, injection + ankle scope same ankle
clinical_input: Medicare pt with L ankle effusion and synovitis. L ankle aspiration/injection and L ankle arthroscopic synovectomy same session.
rationale: Block: ankle injection bundled into ankle arthroscopy per NCCI. Suppress 20605.

clinical_vignette: 34yo M, R tibial shaft fracture, closed reduction + short leg splint
clinical_input: Pt with R tibial shaft fracture. Closed reduction with manipulation performed. Short leg splint applied.
rationale: Warn: splint application included in fracture care code. Informational only.

clinical_vignette: 28yo F, L distal radius fracture, ORIF + long leg splint (different site)
clinical_input: Pt with L distal radius fracture s/p ORIF. Long leg splint also applied for concurrent lower extremity injury management.
rationale: Warn: cast/splint + fracture care triggers rule. Message notes remove unless different site.

clinical_vignette: 72yo F, R tibial shaft fracture, IM nail + long leg splint
clinical_input: Medicare pt with R tibial shaft fracture treated with intramedullary nail. Long leg splint applied post-operatively.
rationale: Warn: splint included in fracture care per NCCI.

clinical_vignette: 41yo M, R distal radius fracture, closed treatment + ankle strapping
clinical_input: Pt with R distal radius fracture. Closed treatment without manipulation. Ankle strapping also applied for unrelated ankle sprain.
rationale: Warn: cast/splint + fracture triggers rule, but different anatomic sites.

clinical_vignette: 38yo M, R knee, diagnostic scope + surgical meniscectomy
clinical_input: Pt with R knee pain. Diagnostic arthroscopy performed, identified medial meniscus tear. Proceeded to partial medial meniscectomy same session.
rationale: Block: diagnostic arthroscopy bundled into surgical arthroscopy. Suppress 29870.

clinical_vignette: 66yo F, L shoulder, diagnostic scope + arthroscopic RCR
clinical_input: Medicare pt with L shoulder pain. Diagnostic shoulder arthroscopy confirmed full-thickness supraspinatus tear. Proceeded to arthroscopic rotator cuff repair.
rationale: Block: diagnostic scope bundled into surgical scope. Suppress 29805.

clinical_vignette: 50yo M, R hip, diagnostic scope + chondroplasty
clinical_input: Pt with R hip pain and labral pathology. Diagnostic hip arthroscopy followed by arthroscopic chondroplasty of femoral head.
rationale: Block: diagnostic hip scope bundled into surgical scope. Suppress 29860.

clinical_vignette: 44yo F, R knee, diagnostic scope + meniscus repair
clinical_input: Medicare pt with R knee locking. Diagnostic arthroscopy identified bucket-handle medial meniscus tear. Arthroscopic meniscus repair performed.
rationale: Block: diagnostic scope bundled into surgical meniscus repair. Suppress 29870.

clinical_vignette: 59yo M, L shoulder, diagnostic scope + extensive debridement
clinical_input: Pt with L shoulder adhesive capsulitis and impingement. Diagnostic scope followed by arthroscopic extensive debridement.
rationale: Block: diagnostic scope bundled into surgical scope. Suppress 29805.

clinical_vignette: 69yo M, R knee loose body removal (scope) + open arthrotomy same knee
clinical_input: Medicare pt with R knee OA and mechanical symptoms. Arthroscopic loose body removal followed by open arthrotomy for extensive synovectomy same session.
rationale: Block: arthroscopy bundled into open arthrotomy per NCCI. Suppress 29874.

clinical_vignette: 67yo F, bilateral TKA billed as 2 units on single line
clinical_input: Pt with bilateral knee OA. Bilateral total knee arthroplasty performed. Billed as 27447 x 2 units on one claim line.
rationale: Block: TKA units (2) exceed MUE limit (1). Use separate lines with -LT/-RT or -50.

clinical_vignette: 73yo M, bilateral THA billed as 2 units single line
clinical_input: Medicare pt with bilateral hip OA. Bilateral THA performed. Billed as 27130 x 2 units on one claim line.
rationale: Block: THA units (2) exceed MUE limit (1). Medicare auto-denies.

clinical_vignette: 42yo M, R knee meniscectomy billed 2 units
clinical_input: Pt with R knee medial and lateral meniscus tears. Meniscectomy billed as 29881 x 2 units.
rationale: Block: meniscectomy units (2) exceed MUE (1). Medial + lateral = 29880 (single code), not 29881 x 2.

clinical_vignette: 58yo F, bilateral shoulder RCR billed 2 units single line
clinical_input: Pt with bilateral rotator cuff tears. Arthroscopic RCR billed as 29827 x 2 units.
rationale: Block: RCR units (2) exceed MUE (1). Use separate lines with -LT/-RT.

clinical_vignette: 55yo M, R knee + R shoulder injections billed as 2 units on single 20610 line
clinical_input: Pt with R knee OA and R shoulder bursitis. Both major joint injections billed as 20610 x 2 units on single claim line.
rationale: Block: injection units (2) exceed MUE (1). Bill as separate lines per joint.

clinical_vignette: 48yo M, bilateral distal radius ORIF billed 2 units
clinical_input: Pt with bilateral distal radius fractures. ORIF billed as 25607 x 2 units on single line.
rationale: Block: ORIF units (2) exceed MUE (1). Use separate lines with -LT/-RT.

clinical_vignette: 65yo F, R TKA, 1 unit (at MUE limit)
clinical_input: Pt with R knee OA. R TKA performed. Billed as 27447 x 1 unit.
rationale: Warn: units at MUE maximum. Informational only.

clinical_vignette: 74yo F, L THA, 1 unit
clinical_input: Medicare pt with L hip OA. L THA performed. Billed as 27130 x 1 unit.
rationale: Warn: units at MUE maximum. Informational only.

clinical_vignette: 39yo M, R knee meniscectomy, 1 unit
clinical_input: Pt with R knee medial meniscus tear. Arthroscopic partial medial meniscectomy. Billed 29881 x 1 unit.
rationale: Warn: units at MUE maximum. Informational only.

clinical_vignette: 61yo F, L shoulder arthroscopic RCR, 1 unit
clinical_input: Medicare pt with L shoulder full-thickness supraspinatus tear. Arthroscopic RCR performed. Billed 29827 x 1.
rationale: Warn: units at MUE maximum. Informational only.

clinical_vignette: 53yo M, R knee injection, 1 unit
clinical_input: Pt with R knee OA. R knee corticosteroid injection performed. Billed 20610 x 1.
rationale: Warn: units at MUE maximum. Informational only.

clinical_vignette: 36yo F, L distal radius ORIF, 1 unit
clinical_input: Medicare pt with L distal radius fracture, 3 fragments. Open reduction internal fixation performed. Billed 25608 x 1.
rationale: Warn: units at MUE maximum. Informational only.

clinical_vignette: 70yo M, R knee scope meniscectomy + chondroplasty different compartment, -59
clinical_input: Medicare pt. R knee medial meniscectomy and lateral chondroplasty. Different compartments documented. Modifier -59 applied to second code.
rationale: Force-review: Medicare -59 should be -XS (separate structure). Replace and confirm.

clinical_vignette: 67yo F, L shoulder scope decompression + distal claviculectomy, -59
clinical_input: Medicare pt. L shoulder arthroscopic subacromial decompression and distal claviculectomy. Modifier -59 on second code.
rationale: Force-review: Medicare -59 should be -XS. Replace and confirm.

clinical_vignette: 68yo M, R knee injection AM + R knee E/M PM, -59
clinical_input: Medicare pt. R knee injection in morning, returned for E/M visit in afternoon same day. Modifier -59 on E/M.
rationale: Force-review: Medicare -59 should be -XE (separate encounter). Replace and confirm.

clinical_vignette: 66yo F, R knee, two surgeons same day same knee, -59
clinical_input: Medicare pt. Surgeon A performed R knee arthroscopic meniscectomy. Surgeon B performed R knee injection different service. Modifier -59 applied by Surgeon B.
rationale: Force-review: Medicare -59 should be -XP (separate practitioner). Replace and confirm.

clinical_vignette: 60yo M, R knee scope + R knee injection same physician, claims -XP
clinical_input: Medicare pt. Same surgeon performed R knee arthroscopy and R knee injection same session. Modifier -XP applied despite same physician.
rationale: Block: -XP requires separate practitioner. Documentation shows same physician. Modifier unsupported.

clinical_vignette: 72yo F, R shoulder injection + E/M, -59
clinical_input: Medicare pt. R shoulder injection and separately identifiable E/M. Modifier -59 on injection code.
rationale: Force-review: Medicare -59 should be -XU or -25 on E/M. Replace and confirm.

clinical_vignette: 47yo M, R knee two procedures, -59 but no distinct service documented
clinical_input: Pt had R knee arthroscopic debridement and chondroplasty. Note describes single continuous procedure. Modifier -59 applied to second code.
rationale: Block: -59 requires documentation of distinct service. Note shows single continuous procedure.

clinical_vignette: 65yo F, L shoulder two procedures, -XS but no separate structure documented
clinical_input: Medicare pt. L shoulder arthroscopic debridement and lysis of adhesions. -XS applied but note does not identify separate structures.
rationale: Block: -XS requires separate structure documentation. Not present in note.

clinical_vignette: 51yo F, bilateral knee injections, -59 but documentation vague
clinical_input: Pt with bilateral knee OA. Both knees injected. Modifier -59 applied but note does not clearly identify bilateral or distinct service.
rationale: Block: -59 without clear documentation of distinct bilateral service.

clinical_vignette: 63yo M, R hip procedures, -XE but same encounter documented
clinical_input: Medicare pt. R hip injection and R hip arthroscopy. -XE applied but note documents both performed in single encounter.
rationale: Block: -XE requires separate encounter. Note shows same encounter.

clinical_vignette: 54yo M, R knee procedures, -59 without distinct documentation, payer unknown
clinical_input: Pt with R knee. Arthroscopic debridement and microfracture. -59 applied, no distinct service language.
rationale: Block: -59 without documentation of distinct service. Payer unknown — apply strict default.

clinical_vignette: 56yo F, bilateral knee injections with -59, commercial
clinical_input: Pt with bilateral knee OA. R knee and L knee injections billed with -59 on second line. Documentation clearly notes bilateral.
rationale: Warn: commercial accepts -59. Suggest -50 or -LT/-RT for clarity.

clinical_vignette: 49yo M, R shoulder injection + E/M with -59, commercial
clinical_input: Pt with R shoulder bursitis. Same-day injection and E/M. -59 on injection, -25 on E/M.
rationale: Warn: commercial accepts -59. X-modifier preferred for specificity.

clinical_vignette: 40yo M, bilateral distal radius ORIF with -59, commercial
clinical_input: Pt with bilateral distal radius fractures. ORIF both wrists. -59 on second line. Documentation specifies bilateral distinct fractures.
rationale: Warn: commercial accepts -59. -LT/-RT on separate lines preferred.

clinical_vignette: 57yo F, R knee arthroscopy meniscectomy + chondroplasty with -59
clinical_input: Pt with R knee medial meniscus tear and lateral chondromalacia. Meniscectomy + chondroplasty different compartments. -59 on chondroplasty.
rationale: Warn: commercial accepts -59. -XS preferred for different compartments.

clinical_vignette: 62yo F, bilateral hip injections with -59, commercial
clinical_input: Pt with bilateral hip OA. R hip and L hip injections. -59 on second line.
rationale: Warn: commercial accepts -59. -50 or -LT/-RT preferred.

clinical_vignette: 68yo F, 4 weeks post R TKA, presents for R knee follow-up, E/M billed without modifier
clinical_input: Pt is 4 weeks post R TKA. Presents for routine post-op follow-up. E/M 99214 billed without global period modifier.
rationale: Block: E/M within 90-day TKA global without modifier. Requires -24, -79, -78, or -58.

clinical_vignette: 72yo M, 6 weeks post L THA, unrelated R knee E/M without modifier
clinical_input: Pt 6 weeks post L THA. Presents with new R knee pain (unrelated). E/M billed without -24.
rationale: Block: E/M within 90-day THA global without modifier. Needs -24 for unrelated E/M.

clinical_vignette: 69yo F, 3 weeks post R shoulder arthroplasty, follow-up E/M no modifier
clinical_input: Medicare pt 3 weeks post R total shoulder arthroplasty. Routine follow-up E/M billed without modifier.
rationale: Block: E/M within 90-day shoulder arthroplasty global without modifier.

clinical_vignette: 45yo M, 5 weeks post R ORIF tibial shaft, follow-up E/M no modifier
clinical_input: Pt 5 weeks post R tibial shaft ORIF. Routine follow-up. E/M billed without modifier. Payer unknown.
rationale: Block: E/M within 90-day ORIF global without modifier.

clinical_vignette: 55yo M, same-day E/M + R knee injection, no -25
clinical_input: Pt with R knee OA. Office visit for evaluation, then R knee corticosteroid injection same day. E/M billed without -25.
rationale: Force-review: E/M + 0-day global injection requires -25 on E/M. Documentation must show separate MDM.

clinical_vignette: 71yo F, same-day E/M + L shoulder injection, no -25
clinical_input: Medicare pt with L shoulder bursitis. E/M evaluation and L shoulder injection same visit. No -25 modifier.
rationale: Force-review: E/M + 0-day injection requires -25. Medicare strict on -25 documentation.

clinical_vignette: 46yo F, same-day E/M + trigger point injection, no -25
clinical_input: Pt with myofascial pain. E/M evaluation and trigger point injections (3 muscles) same day. No -25 modifier.
rationale: Force-review: E/M + 0-day trigger point injection requires -25.

clinical_vignette: 60yo M, same-day E/M + R wrist injection, no -25
clinical_input: Pt with R wrist OA. E/M and R wrist injection same visit. No -25 modifier.
rationale: Force-review: E/M + 0-day injection requires -25.

clinical_vignette: 66yo F, E/M same day as R TKA, no -57
clinical_input: Pt seen in pre-op holding. E/M documented with decision to proceed with R TKA. No -57 modifier.
rationale: Force-review: E/M on day of major surgery needs -57 to indicate decision for surgery.

clinical_vignette: 73yo M, E/M day-before L THA, no -57
clinical_input: Medicare pt. Office visit day before scheduled L THA. Decision for surgery documented. No -57 modifier.
rationale: Force-review: E/M day before major surgery needs -57. Day-before acceptance MAC-variable.

clinical_vignette: 58yo F, E/M same day as R shoulder arthroplasty, no -57
clinical_input: Pt seen day-of R total shoulder arthroplasty. E/M with moderate MDM documented. No -57.
rationale: Force-review: E/M on day of major shoulder surgery needs -57.

clinical_vignette: 35yo M, E/M day-before R ACL reconstruction, no -57
clinical_input: Medicare pt. Office visit day before R ACL reconstruction. Surgical decision made after reviewing MRI. No -57.
rationale: Force-review: E/M day before major surgery needs -57. Medicare day-before acceptance MAC-variable.

clinical_vignette: 68yo F, R knee arthroscopy 6 weeks post R TKA, no modifier
clinical_input: Pt 6 weeks post R TKA. Arthroscopic lysis of adhesions for stiffness. No global period modifier applied.
rationale: Block: procedure during active TKA 90-day global without -58/-78/-79.

clinical_vignette: 71yo M, L shoulder injection 4 weeks post L shoulder arthroplasty, no modifier
clinical_input: Medicare pt 4 weeks post L total shoulder. L shoulder injection for persistent pain. No global period modifier.
rationale: Block: injection during active 90-day shoulder global without modifier.

clinical_vignette: 64yo M, R hip procedure 8 weeks post R THA, no modifier
clinical_input: Pt 8 weeks post R THA. R hip arthroscopy for suspected hardware complication. No global period modifier applied.
rationale: Block: procedure during active THA 90-day global without modifier.

clinical_vignette: 50yo F, L wrist ORIF 7 weeks post previous L wrist surgery, no modifier
clinical_input: Medicare pt 7 weeks post initial L distal radius ORIF. Re-fracture requiring repeat ORIF. No global period modifier.
rationale: Block: ORIF during active 90-day global without -78 or -79.

clinical_vignette: 43yo M, knee arthroscopy meniscectomy, no laterality specified
clinical_input: Pt with knee meniscus tear. Arthroscopic partial meniscectomy performed. No side documented.
rationale: Block: laterality required for knee arthroscopy. Cannot submit without -LT or -RT.

clinical_vignette: 70yo F, shoulder injection, no laterality specified
clinical_input: Medicare pt with shoulder bursitis. Major joint injection performed. Side not documented.
rationale: Block: laterality required for shoulder injection.

clinical_vignette: 65yo M, TKA, no laterality specified
clinical_input: Pt with severe knee OA. Primary total knee arthroplasty performed. Side not documented in note.
rationale: Block: laterality required for TKA.

clinical_vignette: 32yo F, distal radius ORIF, no laterality specified
clinical_input: Pt with distal radius fracture s/p ORIF with plate and screws. 3 fragments. Side not specified. Payer unknown.
rationale: Block: laterality required for ORIF.

clinical_vignette: 52yo M, hip arthroscopy, no laterality
clinical_input: Medicare pt with hip pain. Arthroscopic hip chondroplasty performed. Side not documented.
rationale: Block: laterality required for hip arthroscopy.

clinical_vignette: 63yo M, R TKA with left-side ICD-10 code
clinical_input: Pt with R knee OA. R TKA performed. Diagnosis coded as M17.12 (left knee OA) in error.
rationale: Block: ICD-10 M17.12 (left) contradicts CPT modifier -RT (right). Correct laterality.

clinical_vignette: 67yo F, L shoulder injection with right-side ICD-10
clinical_input: Medicare pt. L shoulder injection performed. Diagnosis coded as M75.111 (right shoulder) in error.
rationale: Block: ICD-10 M75.111 (right) contradicts CPT modifier -LT (left).

clinical_vignette: 60yo M, R hip THA with left-side ICD-10
clinical_input: Pt with R hip AVN. R THA performed. Diagnosis coded as M87.052 (left hip AVN).
rationale: Block: ICD-10 M87.052 (left) contradicts CPT modifier -RT (right).

clinical_vignette: 48yo F, L ankle arthroscopy with right-side ICD-10
clinical_input: Medicare pt. L ankle arthroscopic debridement. Diagnosis coded as M19.071 (right ankle OA).
rationale: Block: ICD-10 M19.071 (right) contradicts CPT modifier -LT (left).

clinical_vignette: 38yo M, R distal radius fracture, no approach documented
clinical_input: Pt with R distal radius fracture. Treatment performed. Note does not specify closed, open, or percutaneous approach.
rationale: Warn: fracture approach not documented. Confirm closed vs open vs percutaneous.

clinical_vignette: 75yo F, L tibial shaft fracture, no approach documented
clinical_input: Medicare pt with L tibial shaft fracture. Treatment performed. Approach not specified in documentation.
rationale: Warn: fracture approach not documented. Affects code selection.

clinical_vignette: 29yo F, R distal radius fracture, closed but manipulation not specified
clinical_input: Pt with R distal radius fracture. Closed treatment documented. Whether manipulation was performed is not stated.
rationale: Warn: manipulation status not documented. 25600 vs 25605 depends on manipulation.

clinical_vignette: 55yo M, R metatarsal fracture, no approach documented
clinical_input: Medicare pt with R fifth metatarsal fracture. Treatment performed. Approach not documented.
rationale: Warn: fracture approach not documented. Confirm for code selection.

clinical_vignette: 47yo F, "rule out meniscal tear" in outpatient setting
clinical_input: Pt with R knee pain after twisting injury. Assessed to rule out medial meniscal tear. Outpatient setting.
rationale: Block: "rule out" diagnosis in outpatient. Code confirmed condition or presenting symptom (M25.561 knee pain).

clinical_vignette: 42yo M, "suspected ACL tear" in outpatient
clinical_input: Medicare pt with R knee instability after sports injury. Documentation states "suspected ACL tear." Outpatient.
rationale: Block: "suspected" diagnosis in outpatient. Code symptom (M25.361 instability) or confirmed finding.

clinical_vignette: 78yo F, "possible hip fracture" in outpatient
clinical_input: Pt with L hip pain after fall. "Possible L hip fracture" documented pending imaging. Outpatient.
rationale: Block: "possible" diagnosis in outpatient. Code symptom (M25.552 hip pain) until confirmed.

clinical_vignette: 59yo M, "probable rotator cuff tear" in outpatient
clinical_input: Medicare pt with R shoulder weakness. "Probable R rotator cuff tear" documented. Outpatient.
rationale: Block: "probable" diagnosis in outpatient. Code confirmed condition or symptom (M25.511 shoulder pain).

clinical_vignette: 51yo F, "knee injection" without specifying which joint
clinical_input: Pt presents for knee injection. Note says "injected the knee." No specification of which knee or specific joint compartment.
rationale: Block (R-3.5.1 for laterality) + Warn (R-3.5.5 for specificity). Most severe = block.

clinical_vignette: 61yo M, "fracture treatment" without bone or location
clinical_input: Medicare pt. "Fracture treated." No specification of which bone, location, or approach.
rationale: Block (R-3.5.1) + Warn (R-3.5.3, R-3.5.5). Most severe = block.

clinical_vignette: 64yo F, "joint replacement" without joint specified
clinical_input: Pt scheduled for joint replacement. Note says "total joint arthroplasty." Does not specify knee, hip, or shoulder.
rationale: Block (R-3.5.1) + Warn (R-3.5.5). Most severe = block.

clinical_vignette: 58yo, knee scope + TKA same session, no laterality
clinical_input: Pt with severe knee OA. Arthroscopy and TKA performed same session. Laterality not documented.
rationale: Block: PTP bundling (suppress 29881) + missing laterality.

clinical_vignette: 62yo M, R knee injection + R knee scope + E/M without -25, Medicare
clinical_input: Medicare pt. R knee injection, R knee arthroscopic debridement, and E/M same day. No -25 on E/M.
rationale: Block: injection bundled into scope (R-3.1.2). Force-review: E/M without -25 (R-3.4.2). Most severe = block.

clinical_vignette: 70yo, 3 weeks post TKA, E/M without modifier, no laterality
clinical_input: Pt 3 weeks post TKA. Follow-up E/M without global period modifier. Side of prior TKA not documented.
rationale: Block: E/M in 90-day global without modifier + missing laterality.

clinical_vignette: 66yo F, TKA 2 units single line, no laterality
clinical_input: Pt with bilateral knee OA. TKA billed as 2 units on single line. Laterality not documented.
rationale: Block: MUE overage (2 > 1) + missing laterality.

clinical_vignette: 50yo M, knee procedures with -XS but no distinct documentation, no laterality
clinical_input: Pt with knee pathology. Arthroscopic debridement and chondroplasty. -XS applied but note lacks distinct structure language and laterality.
rationale: Block: -XS without documentation + missing laterality.

clinical_vignette: 68yo F, diagnostic + surgical knee scope, Medicare -59, no laterality
clinical_input: Medicare pt. Diagnostic knee scope + surgical meniscectomy. -59 on diagnostic code. Side not documented.
rationale: Block: diagnostic scope bundled (R-3.1.4). Force-review: Medicare -59 (R-3.3.1). Block: missing laterality (R-3.5.1). Most severe = block.

clinical_vignette: 65yo M, R knee scope in TKA global + 2 units
clinical_input: Pt 5 weeks post R TKA. R knee arthroscopy for stiffness billed with 2 units. No global period modifier.
rationale: Block: procedure in 90-day global without modifier + units exceed MUE.

clinical_vignette: 69yo M, R knee scope + R TKA in 90-day L TKA global, L-side ICD-10
clinical_input: Medicare pt 4 weeks post L TKA. Now R knee scope + R TKA same session. ICD-10 coded as M17.12 (left).
rationale: Block: scope+TKA bundling + E/M in L TKA global + ICD-10 laterality mismatch (L vs R).

clinical_vignette: 48yo F, R knee injection + R knee scope + rule-out diagnosis
clinical_input: Pt with R knee pain. R knee injection and R knee arthroscopy same day. Diagnosis documented as "rule out meniscal tear."
rationale: Block: injection bundled into scope + rule-out diagnosis in outpatient.

clinical_vignette: 72yo M, E/M + injection same day no -25, vague anatomic description
clinical_input: Medicare pt. E/M and "joint injection" same day. Note says "injected the joint" without specifying which joint. No -25.
rationale: Force-review: E/M + 0-day no -25 (R-3.4.2). Warn: missing specificity (R-3.5.5). Most severe = force-review.

clinical_vignette: 33yo M, R tibial fracture + splint, approach not documented
clinical_input: Pt with R tibial shaft fracture. Treatment and splint application. Approach not documented.
rationale: Warn: cast bundled into fracture care (R-3.1.3). Warn: approach missing (R-3.5.3). Both warn only.

clinical_vignette: 69yo F, Medicare E/M + R shoulder injection, -59 on injection, no -25 on E/M
clinical_input: Medicare pt. R shoulder injection and E/M same day. -59 on injection. No -25 on E/M.
rationale: Force-review: Medicare -59 should be X-modifier (R-3.3.1) + E/M needs -25 (R-3.4.2).

clinical_vignette: 56yo M, R knee injection 2 units + -59 without documentation
clinical_input: Pt with R knee OA. Injection billed as 2 units on single line with -59. No distinct service documentation.
rationale: Block: units exceed MUE (R-3.2.1) + -59 without documentation (R-3.3.2).

clinical_vignette: 71yo M, E/M in 90-day TKA global, "suspected" diagnosis, Medicare -59
clinical_input: Medicare pt 6 weeks post R TKA. E/M for "suspected infection." -59 on E/M. Outpatient.
rationale: Block: E/M in 90-day global without proper modifier + "suspected" diagnosis + Medicare -59.

clinical_vignette: 60yo, knee scope + open knee procedure, 2 units, no laterality, payer unknown
clinical_input: Pt with knee OA. Arthroscopy and open arthrotomy same session. 2 units billed. No side documented. Payer not specified.
rationale: Block: scope bundled into open procedure + MUE overage on scope + missing laterality.

clinical_vignette: 66yo F, R TKA, complete documentation, commercial
clinical_input: Pt with right knee severe OA unresponsive to conservative treatment. Right primary total knee arthroplasty performed. Cemented CR components placed. No complications.
rationale: Pass: complete documentation, correct laterality, units within MUE, no conflicts.

clinical_vignette: 74yo M, L shoulder injection with US guidance, Medicare
clinical_input: Medicare pt with left shoulder OA. Left shoulder ultrasound-guided corticosteroid injection performed. Confirmed OA on prior imaging.
rationale: Pass: complete documentation, correct laterality, US guidance documented, MUE OK.

clinical_vignette: 31yo M, R distal radius ORIF, 3 fragments, commercial
clinical_input: Pt with right distal radius fracture, 3 fragments. Open reduction internal fixation with volar locking plate. Right side confirmed.
rationale: Pass: approach (ORIF), fragment count (3), laterality (right) all documented.
